message:
fix(node): handle non-finite values in memory tail-risk telemetry and rename idempotency key function

Add sanitize_unit_interval() to guard against NaN/Infinity in
MemoryTailRiskTelemetry, returning conservative defaults instead of
silently clamping non-finite values. Refactor evaluate() to delegate to
certify() for consistent blocking decisions. Add tests for NaN/Infinity
handling and evaluate/certify consistency. Rename compute_idempotency_key
to calculate_idempotency_key in migration_pipeline.rs for naming
consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
